title: Namibia Correctional Service FC

infobox.value: (**NCS FC**) is a [Namibian](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") club based in [Mariental](/wiki/Mariental,_Namibia "Mariental, Namibia") which currently plays in the [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership"). It is the football side of the sports club representing the [Namibia Correctional Service](/wiki/Ministry_of_Home_Affairs_(Namibia) "Ministry of Home Affairs (Namibia)").

Schutz, Helge. ["NCS, KK Palace promoted, BA survive after dubious victory"](https://www.namibian.com.na/ncs-kk-palace-promoted-ba-survive-after-dubious-victory/#:~:text=Namibia%20Correctional%20Service%20gained%20promotion,Division%20title%20over%20the%20weekend). The Namibian. Retrieved 5 July 2024.
["KK Palace, NCS promoted to Premier League"](https://futuremedianews.com.na/2024/05/21/kk-palace-ncs-promoted-to-premier-league/). Future Media News. Retrieved 5 July 2024.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Namibian football club

Football club

Namibia Correctional Service FC

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Nickname | NCS FC |
| Ground | Mariental Stadium |
| Capacity | 500 |
| League | [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership") |

**Namibia Correctional Service FC** (**NCS FC**) is a [Namibian](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") club based in [Mariental](/wiki/Mariental,_Namibia "Mariental, Namibia") which currently plays in the [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership"). It is the football side of the sports club representing the [Namibia Correctional Service](/wiki/Ministry_of_Home_Affairs_(Namibia) "Ministry of Home Affairs (Namibia)").

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Namibia_Correctional_Service_FC&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Namibia Correctional Service FC won [First Division Southern Stream](/wiki/First_Division_(Namibia) "First Division (Namibia)") for the 2023/2024 season, earning promotion to the [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership") for the first time.[[1]](#cite_note-NCS,_KK_Palace_promoted-1) En route to promote, the club won eighteen of its twenty-two matches that season.[[2]](#cite_note-promoted_to_Premier_League-2)

In 2024 their participation in the Premier League was blocked because another club with the same owners ([Khomas Nampol](/wiki/Khomas_NAMPOL_FC "Khomas NAMPOL FC")) were already in the league. NCS appealed in court but it was unsuccessful.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Honours

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Namibia_Correctional_Service_FC&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Honours")]

* [First Division](/wiki/First_Division_(Namibia) "First Division (Namibia)") Southern Stream

:   :   Winners: 2023/2024
